description: Bee — The Progressive Intelligence Engine: tiered LLM, 11 tools, hosted API, free tier.
name: io.github.cuilabs/bee

environmentVariables.description: Bee API key (bee_sk_…). Create one at https://bee.cuilabs.io/app/account/api-keys — the free Cell tier works.
environmentVariables.name: BEE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Default model tier (bee-cell … bee-swarm). Tier access follows the API key's plan. Default: bee-cell (free).
environmentVariables.name: BEE_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Override the gateway base URL (default https://bee.cuilabs.io/bee). Set only for a self-hosted Bee Enclave or staging.
environmentVariables.name: BEE_API_URL

title: Bee — The Progressive Intelligence Engine
